description_long: This object is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a broad, domed base and a prominent, rounded protrusion rising from one side, resembling a natural boulder or a weathered urban barrier. The surface is rough and uneven, with subtle undulations and a matte, chalky appearance, suggesting it is composed of sedimentary rock such as limestone or sandstone. One side features a distinct, circular hole or cavity, possibly formed by natural erosion or as a result of human modification. The coloration is predominantly off-white to light beige, with slight variations in tone that enhance its naturalistic look. The stone's form is asymmetrical, with the protruding section giving it a unique silhouette that could serve as a visual or physical obstacle in an urban setting. Its substantial mass and solid construction make it suitable for use as a boundary marker, traffic deterrent, or decorative element in parks or plazas.
description: A large, rough-textured, off-white stone with a domed base and a prominent rounded protrusion, featuring a circular hole on one side. Its irregular, natural form and solid appearance make it ideal as an urban barrier or decorative boulder.
description_view_0: From this view, the stone's broad, domed base and the tall, rounded protrusion are most prominent, giving it a distinctive, upright profile.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the circular hole or cavity on the side of the stone, as well as the uneven, sloping surface leading up to the protrusion.
description_view_2: The protrusion is again central, but the surface texture and subtle color variations are more visible, emphasizing the stone's rough, natural finish.
description_view_3: The side view highlights the depth and placement of the circular hole, as well as the asymmetrical rise of the protrusion from the base.
attribute_location: urban park, plaza, or roadside median
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or boundary marker on pavement or landscaped ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle, irregular mottling and natural pitting with no artificial carvings; the surface is visually complex due to weathering.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly eroded, with a matte finish and minor surface pitting, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth, man-made surfaces but can blend with natural landscaping or other stone features; may accumulate debris or vegetation at the base.
